templates.text: DANGER! A hidden trap lurks to the {direction} in the {roomName}. Step carefully.
I overheard the dungeon-keeper say: beware the {roomName} — the floor is treacherous to the {direction}.
The old map marks a trap somewhere in the {roomName}.
Watch your step near the {direction} side of the {roomName} — something's wrong with the floor.
The escape route leads through the {roomName} to the {direction}.
I saw the exit door in the {roomName}. Head {direction} from the start.
The dungeon-keeper's quarters are near the exit — look for them in the {roomName}.
A merchant stashed gold in the {roomName} to the {direction}. It's unguarded.
The {roomName} holds treasure — head {direction} to find it.
Rumour has it there's unclaimed gold somewhere in the {roomName}.
The rune plates must be activated in this exact order: {colorSequence}.
The ancient inscription reads: press the plates {colorSequence} — or face the curse.
A ghost whispered the plate sequence to me: {colorSequence}. Don't ask how.
I memorised the puzzle: {colorSequence} — tell the others when you find the rune chamber.
